name: Landbay Inc
summary: PART I . History and Overview Landbay Inc was incorporated in New York State on January 28, 2016. Our current principle executive office is located at Room 3501, EFC Building, Yuhang District, Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, China. Tel: +86-18621851468. On July 24, 2019, Larison Inc, the principal stockholder and 100% controlled by the former President of the Company (Seller), entered into a Stock Purchase Agreement (the Agreement) with Northern Ifurniture Inc (the Buyer).
